---
title: "Modelling bookings in association football"
date: 2022-07-12
author: [ "Jess Hargreaves" , "Ben Powell"]
publication: "Proceedings of MathSport International 2022 Conference"
categories: ["Football"]
url_source: https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/229624/
url_preprint: 
journ: "Proceedings of MathSport International 2022 Conference"
page: 34-44
year: 2022
image: image_1.png
editor: 'source'
---
